rationale.R1.3: The output mentions improvements in mAP but doesn't explicitly link them to specific claims about robustness to occlusion, sparse LiDAR, etc.
rationale.RX.1: The output presents the results as a single aggregate mAP score without differentiating confidence levels for different scenarios or claims.
rationale.RX.3: The output focuses on the default OPV2V test split and doesn't mention any deviations from the agreed-upon active set.
rationale.RX.4: No evidence of harmful content or regressions is presented. The focus is on performance improvement.
rationale.RX.5: The output lacks detailed information about the source of the reported mAP scores and how they were obtained.
